degraded: F0 suite RED on ONE pre-existing, foreign failure: test_architecture_md_reflects_arch_impact flags a decision-drop belonging to iterate-2026-07-18-fr-existence-gate (gitignored drops resolve from the MAIN root, so a concurrent iterate's drop reddens this worktree). The run_id in the failure is not this run's - inherited, not introduced.

The triage half of the convergence has ZERO live instances in this repo (0 source="security" items), so it is proven on fixtures, not on live data. Its only live reachability is the pre-acceptance backlog, because ingest-time suppression means an accepted rule normally never becomes a triage item at all. Stated rather than implied by the passing tests.

The register currently holds 0 github-dismissal entries, so the live `converge` run exercised the read/pagination/identity path against 51 real alerts but matched nothing. The mutation path is proven by fixtures plus the live 422 permission probe, not by a real dismissal.

External review (GPT-5.4) returned 'block' with 3 real defects: an absent register short-circuited reopen (marked alerts stayed suppressed forever), overlapping entries double-claimed an alert, and an unreadable triage store rendered as 'converged' - the last actively blessed by a test in the first draft. All three are fixed and pinned; recorded because they calibrate how far a self-authored negative-control suite reaches.

surface_verification.runner: uv run --with pytest --with pytest-mock pytest shared/tests/test_alert_match.py shared/tests/test_accepted_risk_convergence.py shared/tests/test_github_code_scanning.py shared/tests/test_accepted_risks_converge_cli.py -q

behaviors.behavior: Alert payload -> match key; every missing key component yields None, never a partial
Line number is excluded from the match key (it drifts on every edit above the finding)
Provenance marker round-trips; an unmarked/malformed comment reads as human
Dismissal comment carries statement+ref+expiry; truncation never eats the marker
Scope validation: tool required, breadth declared, paths/rule-wide mutually exclusive, reason vocabulary
Matching on (tool, rule, path); rule-wide; cross-tool isolation; ambiguous entry matches nothing
Triage dedup-key parse incl. colon-bearing check_id; unparseable key matches nothing
Plan dispositions: dismiss / satisfied / human / reopen-on-expiry / reopen-on-removal / stale / ambiguous / expiry boundary
No backing entry => never dismissed; non-github targets never reach the alert surface
Triage surface: match, non-match, expired no-op, GC tokens registered and is_machine_churn true
Rendering: every disposition printed; untouched summarised; a clean plan renders nothing
gh shell: slug validation (10 negative controls), pagination, None != [], PATCH bodies, failure surfaced, explicit UTF-8 decode
CLI: build_plan, identity abort, failed-listing abort, read-only vs --apply, failed mutation, dispatch, exit 2
This repo's register: every github-dismissal entry resolvable + marked; converge absent from every workflow
Overlapping entries CONFLICT and neither acts; a lapse in one does not reopen what the other still covers
Absent vs unreadable triage store are distinct; an unreadable store blocks the converged claim end-to-end

test_completeness.enumeration_basis: Every behavior introduced or changed by this diff, grouped into 16 rows over 124 new tests. No 'untestable' rows: all logic here is offline and deterministic, with the gh boundary driven through a single monkeypatched _run seam. The one claim that cannot be asserted in a test - that the token may PATCH a code-scanning alert - is closed by live probe P1 (a 422 body-validation response proves authn+authz passed and mutates nothing), because the only test-shaped version overwrites a real alert comment. Line coverage of the four new modules is 100% (alert_match, alert_convergence, github_code_scanning, tools/accepted_risks_converge). Rows 15-16 were added in response to the external review, which found three real defects my own negative controls did not reach - all of the same family: a state that renders as converged when it is not.
